note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower leg wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Right lower leg measures 5.6 cm x 5.0 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 64% slough, 36% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Right lower leg — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Offloading boot applied.

Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 5.6x5.0x0.7cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 70% gran, 30% slough. Periwound macerated. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Thornton notified.
